subject: A massive shaggy white-furred horned beast (snowhorn / woolly mammoth-like creature) charging through a snowy mountain pass, ridden by a small armored human warrior braced low against its neck
description: A huge tusked, horned, shaggy white-and-cream beast surges forward through swirling snow and broken rock. Its long curved horns and bared teeth dominate the foreground; thick fur whips back from the wind of its charge. A tiny rider is hunched against the creature's neck, clad in dark armor with leather straps, holding on as the mount plows ahead. The background dissolves into pale icy peaks and a churned-up cloud of snow and dust. The palette is cold — bone-white, pale grey, dim blue-white sky — punctuated by the warmer tan-brown of the rider's gear and the beast's rust-brown horn tips. Lighting is flat and diffuse, the muted glare of an overcast snow-day.
foreground: shaggy horned beast charging, small rider clinging to its neck
background: snowy mountain peaks dissolving into wind-blown snow and pale sky
emotion: ferocious determination — beast roaring forward, rider braced and committed
